invoice_text: Invoice No: INV-188 | Date: 2025-06-25 | From: Wipro Peripherals | To: Chatterjee IT Center, Kolkata | Items: 4x Wireless Presenter Laser @Rs.2000 | Subtotal: Rs.8000 | GST (18%): Rs.1440 | Total: Rs.9440 | Payment Due: 2025-07-25
customer_feedback: Laser doesn't work from more than 3 meters in bright rooms. Range is severely limited compared to what's advertised. Wipro Peripherals presenters are overpriced for what they deliver.

invoice_text: Invoice No: INV-189 | Date: 2026-02-12 | From: Reliance Digital Wholesale | To: Sharma Home Appliances, Mumbai | Items: 5x Amazon Echo Dot 5th Gen @Rs.4500 | Subtotal: Rs.22500 | GST (18%): Rs.4050 | Total: Rs.26550 | Payment Due: 2026-03-12
customer_feedback: Echo Dots are popular gift items. Sound quality has improved from previous generation. Customers find Alexa increasingly useful. Good seller in our showroom.

invoice_text: Invoice No: INV-190 | Date: 2025-09-22 | From: HCL Digital Store | To: Goswami Office Automation, Indore | Items: 2x Binding Machine @Rs.6000 | Subtotal: Rs.12000 | GST (18%): Rs.2160 | Total: Rs.14160 | Payment Due: 2025-10-22
customer_feedback: Binding machines handle up to 200 sheets as specified. The punch mechanism is smooth. Adequate for our document binding needs in the office.

invoice_text: Invoice No: INV-191 | Date: 2025-11-18 | From: Flipkart Wholesale | To: Pandey Electronics Hub, Varanasi | Items: 8x Noise ColorFit Pro 5 @Rs.4000 | Subtotal: Rs.32000 | GST (18%): Rs.5760 | Total: Rs.37760 | Payment Due: 2025-12-18
customer_feedback: Smartwatches sell well and customers love the AMOLED display. SpO2 and heart rate tracking are accurate. Flipkart Wholesale bulk pricing gives us healthy margins.

invoice_text: Invoice No: INV-192 | Date: 2025-07-05 | From: TechNova Solutions Pvt Ltd | To: Roy Computer Service, Patna | Items: 5x CPU Cooler Tower @Rs.3000 | Subtotal: Rs.15000 | GST (18%): Rs.2700 | Total: Rs.17700 | Payment Due: 2025-08-05
customer_feedback: Cooler fan bearings started making grinding noise within a month on 2 units. TechNova Solutions' cooling products are not reliable for the price. Expected better quality control.

invoice_text: Invoice No: INV-193 | Date: 2026-03-12 | From: Freshworks Software | To: Nair Travel Agency, Trivandrum | Items: 4x Freshsales Travel CRM (Annual) @Rs.18000 | Subtotal: Rs.72000 | GST (18%): Rs.12960 | Total: Rs.84960 | Payment Due: 2026-04-12
customer_feedback: Freshsales has helped us track travel inquiries and conversions efficiently. The pipeline view gives clear visibility into our sales funnel. Customization options are extensive and user-friendly.

invoice_text: Invoice No: INV-194 | Date: 2025-10-10 | From: Infosys BPO Supplies | To: Saxena Corp, Agra | Items: 25x ID Card Holder @Rs.30, 25x Lanyard @Rs.20 | Subtotal: Rs.1250 | GST (18%): Rs.225 | Total: Rs.1475 | Payment Due: 2025-11-10
customer_feedback: ID card holders and lanyards are basic quality. Functional for corporate use. Standard bulk order.

invoice_text: Invoice No: INV-195 | Date: 2025-08-28 | From: CloudMinds India Pvt Ltd | To: Desai Web Dev, Ahmedabad | Items: 1x CI/CD Pipeline Setup @Rs.100000 | Subtotal: Rs.100000 | GST (18%): Rs.18000 | Total: Rs.118000 | Payment Due: 2025-09-28
customer_feedback: CloudMinds India set up our CI/CD pipeline but the configuration was poorly documented. When their engineer left, nobody could maintain it. Rs.1 lakh for a black-box setup is not acceptable.

invoice_text: Invoice No: INV-196 | Date: 2026-01-28 | From: Tata Consultancy Peripherals | To: Bhonsle IT, Pune | Items: 8x Logitech Rally Speakerphone @Rs.22000 | Subtotal: Rs.176000 | GST (18%): Rs.31680 | Total: Rs.207680 | Payment Due: 2026-02-28
customer_feedback: Logitech Rally speakerphones deliver conference-room quality audio. Voice pickup is excellent even from the far end of the table. Tata Consultancy Peripherals gave us priority delivery for our boardroom refresh.

invoice_text: Invoice No: INV-197 | Date: 2025-12-02 | From: DataServe Technologies | To: Ahuja Networking, Delhi | Items: 3x Managed Switch 48-port PoE @Rs.45000 | Subtotal: Rs.135000 | GST (18%): Rs.24300 | Total: Rs.159300 | Payment Due: 2026-01-02
customer_feedback: Managed switches are feature-rich. VLAN configuration and QoS settings are accessible through the web interface. DataServe Technologies pre-configured them per our specifications.

invoice_text: Invoice No: INV-198 | Date: 2025-06-15 | From: Bharat Electronics Ltd | To: Chand Electronics, Ranchi | Items: 4x PA System Speaker @Rs.15000 | Subtotal: Rs.60000 | GST (18%): Rs.10800 | Total: Rs.70800 | Payment Due: 2025-07-15
customer_feedback: PA speakers produce distortion at high volumes. For a public address system, this is a dealbreaker. Bharat Electronics should test audio quality at all volume levels before shipping.

invoice_text: Invoice No: INV-199 | Date: 2026-02-25 | From: Wipro Peripherals | To: Kapoor Digital Mall, Jalandhar | Items: 5x Laptop Docking Station Thunderbolt @Rs.12000 | Subtotal: Rs.60000 | GST (18%): Rs.10800 | Total: Rs.70800 | Payment Due: 2026-03-25
customer_feedback: Thunderbolt docking stations work flawlessly with both Windows and Mac. Dual 4K output is smooth with no flickering. Wipro Peripherals hit a home run with these docks.

invoice_text: Invoice No: INV-200 | Date: 2025-09-30 | From: Reliance Digital Wholesale | To: Ahluwalia Tech House, Chandigarh | Items: 2x Sony 65-inch BRAVIA TV @Rs.95000 | Subtotal: Rs.190000 | GST (18%): Rs.34200 | Total: Rs.224200 | Payment Due: 2025-10-30
customer_feedback: Sony BRAVIA TVs have exceptional picture quality and the Android TV interface is smooth. Reliance Digital Wholesale delivered with premium handling. Already had two customers asking where we got them.
